data.content: Added agent label to all terminal TAKE N/M and Claimed log lines in terminal-manager.ts. The effective agent (override or default) is now always shown via [agent: <label>] suffix. Three log sites updated: the Claimed line in buildNextTakePrompt, and both TAKE iteration log sites in the take-loop close handlers. All quality gates pass (lint, tsc, 1956 tests, build). Commit 125e3233 pushed to main.
